h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to practice distinguishing headers from values with the tutor's guidance.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: If the top word starts to look like the answer, stop there: top word equals field name. Row cell equals value.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor adapts to the learner's concern in L2 by introducing a specific 'stop' heuristic in T2.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent tutor uptake.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent tutor uptake.

tutor_strategy_reversal.evidence: If the top word starts to look like the answer, stop there: top word equals field name. Row cell equals value.
tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor adapts to the learner's concern in L2 by introducing a specific 'stop' heuristic in T2.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.evidence: If the top word starts to look like the answer, stop there: top word equals field name. Row cell equals value.
tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor adapts to the learner's concern in L2 by introducing a specific 'stop' heuristic in T2.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: Oh, okay: y row = copy the printed y-axis label, then unit only if the axis shows one in brackets.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to struggle with separating the story context from the exact printed labels on the graph.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor does not change strategy or adapt, but rather repeats the same template and instructions across all turns.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, and the tutor does not adapt to any revised framing.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn, and the tutor does not adapt to any revised framing.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor does not change strategy or adapt, but rather repeats the same template and instructions across all turns.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor does not change strategy or adapt, but rather repeats the same template and instructions across all turns.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: The key strip under it helps: rabbit is the food, so rabbit to hawk, point on hawk.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to practice drawing food-web arrows while struggling with the visual distraction of the hunter/chase instinct.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: The eraser is already on the food label. Tail stays there. Now the point goes to the organism getting energy. Draw that arrow first; the hunter picture stays covered for this check.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor adapts to the learner's persistent distraction by physically covering the hunter drawing to isolate the text labels.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.evidence: The eraser is already on the food label. Tail stays there. Now the point goes to the organism getting energy. Draw that arrow first; the hunter picture stays covered for this check.
tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor adapts to the learner's persistent distraction by physically covering the hunter drawing to isolate the text labels.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.evidence: The eraser is already on the food label. Tail stays there. Now the point goes to the organism getting energy. Draw that arrow first; the hunter picture stays covered for this check.
tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor adapts to the learner's persistent distraction by physically covering the hunter drawing to isolate the text labels.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to place the remaining force cards on the diagram step-by-step as prompted by the tutor.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor does not change strategy or register because the learner proceeds smoothly without error or resistance.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor does not change strategy or register because the learner proceeds smoothly without error or resistance.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor does not change strategy or register because the learner proceeds smoothly without error or resistance.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to verify contour lines and elevations as prompted by the tutor.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: The arrow moved; the contour did not. Same printed line, same tile. Touch one new spot on the bend and read the legend number once more.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor introduces a physical manipulation of the overlay to decouple the route shape from the contour line, directly addressing the learner's struggle.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to respond to.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to respond to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.evidence: The arrow moved; the contour did not. Same printed line, same tile. Touch one new spot on the bend and read the legend number once more.
tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor introduces a physical manipulation of the overlay to decouple the route shape from the contour line, directly addressing the learner's struggle.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.evidence: The arrow moved; the contour did not. Same printed line, same tile. Touch one new spot on the bend and read the legend number once more.
tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor introduces a physical manipulation of the overlay to decouple the route shape from the contour line, directly addressing the learner's struggle.
